title: [v3.4] fix CVE-2022-1227
body:
Vendor in the backports for psgo.  Note that we cannot use psgo v1.7.1+
as v1.7.2 bumped too many dependencies.

Hence psgo has a v1.7.1-fedora branch that will be used for Podman v3.4.x
for Fedora.  The v3.4.2-rhel branch uses c/storage v1.36.x so we need a
separate branches in psgo for Fedora and RHEL.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@redhat.com>

@containers/podman-maintainers @lsm5 PTAL

comments.body: Need to update the psgo code as it's using newer go features.

/hold

Big sigh ... the v3.4.2-rhel branch uses another minor version c/storage.  Need to redo the dance and massage a bit.

/hold cancel

OK.  Now there is a v1.7.1-fedora and -rhel branch.
